name: Bread Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Use 3 to 4 slices of bread for a thin sauce, 6 to 7 slices for medium sauce and 9 to 10 slices for a thick sauce. Unless a white-colored sauce is desired, leave the bread crusts on and use less bread.
Warm the blender container by filling it with hot water and letting it stand for about one minute then empty the water out. Put the hot milk, butter or margarine and salt in the blender container and blend until well mixed. With the blender running, break the bread into pieces and add to the blender container. Stop the blender occasionally to check the consistency. Serve at once or keep hot in a sauce warmer.
Makes 1 1/4 cups.
